data.name: ProductNotFound
data.value: Product with ID '{0}' does not exist in the system.

data.name: ProductCodeExists
data.value: Product code (SKU) '{0}' already exists in the system. Please enter a different SKU.

data.name: ProductCodeConflict
data.value: Product code (SKU) '{0}' is already used by another product.

data.name: ProductImageSaveError
data.value: Error decoding and saving product image: {0}

data.name: ProductCreateSuccess
data.value: Product added successfully.

data.name: ProductUpdateSuccess
data.value: Product updated successfully.

data.name: ProductDeleteSuccess
data.value: Product deleted successfully.

data.name: ProductDeleteSoftSuccess
data.value: Product has active transactions or inventory. Automatically changed status to 'Inactive' (Soft-delete) to preserve data integrity.

data.name: ProductRouteIdMismatch
data.value: Product ID in the route mismatch with body data.

data.name: LoginInvalidCredentials
data.value: Incorrect username or password.

data.name: LoginAccountLocked
data.value: Your account has been locked.

data.name: LoginSuccess
data.value: Login successful.

data.name: ProductCodeRequired
data.value: Product code (SKU) cannot be empty.

data.name: ProductCodeMaxLength
data.value: Product code cannot exceed 50 characters.

data.name: ProductNameRequired
data.value: Product name cannot be empty.

data.name: ProductNameMaxLength
data.value: Product name cannot exceed 200 characters.

data.name: ProductSellingPriceRange
data.value: Selling price must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: ProductImportPriceRange
data.value: Import price must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: ProductIdRequired
data.value: Product ID is required.

data.name: UserNotFound
data.value: User with ID '{0}' does not exist in the system.

data.name: UsernameExists
data.value: Username '{0}' already exists. Please choose a different username.

data.name: EmailExists
data.value: Email address '{0}' is already registered by another account.

data.name: RoleNotFound
data.value: Role '{0}' does not exist in the system.

data.name: BranchNotFound
data.value: Branch with ID '{0}' does not exist in the system.

data.name: UserCreateSuccess
data.value: User created successfully.

data.name: UserUpdateSuccess
data.value: User updated successfully.

data.name: UserDeleteSuccess
data.value: User deleted successfully.

data.name: UserDeleteAdminSelfError
data.value: Cannot delete your own logged-in admin account.

data.name: UserUsernameRequired
data.value: Username cannot be empty.

data.name: UserPasswordRequired
data.value: Password is required and must be at least 6 characters.

data.name: UserFullNameRequired
data.value: Full name cannot be empty.

data.name: UserEmailRequired
data.value: Email address cannot be empty.

data.name: UserEmailInvalid
data.value: Email address format is invalid.

data.name: UserRoleRequired
data.value: User role selection is required.

data.name: UserIdRequired
data.value: User ID is required.

data.name: RouteIdMismatch
data.value: The ID in the route does not match the ID in the request body.

data.name: OrderNotFound
data.value: Order with ID '{0}' does not exist in the system.

data.name: OrderCreateSuccess
data.value: Order created successfully.

data.name: OrderInsufficientStock
data.value: Insufficient stock for product '{0}'. Available: {1}, requested: {2}.

data.name: OrderProductBatchNotFound
data.value: Product batch '{0}' does not exist or has expired.

data.name: OrderProductBatchInsufficient
data.value: Product batch '{0}' has insufficient stock. Available: {1}, requested: {2}.

data.name: PaymentOrderAlreadyPaid
data.value: This order is already fully paid.

data.name: PaymentAmountInvalid
data.value: Payment amount must be greater than 0.

data.name: PaymentCreateSuccess
data.value: Payment processed successfully.

data.name: LocationNotFound
data.value: Shelf/Location with ID '{0}' does not exist at this branch.

data.name: StockTransferNotFound
data.value: Stock transfer with ID '{0}' does not exist.

data.name: StockTransferStatusInvalid
data.value: Stock transfer status must be Pending or Shipped to receive.

data.name: StockTransferDetailNotFound
data.value: Stock transfer has no items.

data.name: InventoryImportSuccess
data.value: Stock batches imported successfully.

data.name: StockTransferCreateSuccess
data.value: Stock transfer created and shipped successfully.

data.name: StockTransferReceiveSuccess
data.value: Stock transfer received and added to inventory.

data.name: ReplenishSuccess
data.value: Shelf replenishment verified successfully.

data.name: ReplenishQuantityInvalid
data.value: Replenishment quantity must be greater than 0.
